subject: chore(docs,pwa): remove HISTORY.md, add Communication section, ship icon cache-bust
body:
Cross-project cleanup sweep against budgy-ting:

- Delete docs/HISTORY.md; git history is the changelog. Update CLAUDE.md
  Documentation rules + AI_MISTAKES.md + TODO.md header comment to match.
- Add Communication section to CLAUDE.md (verbatim from glow-props) and
  insert COMMUNICATION into the header reminder line. Removed duplicate
  communication bullet from AI Notes.
- Content-hash every PWA icon URL: iconCacheBustHtml() Vite plugin rewrites
  <link rel="icon"> hrefs at build time; versioned() helper carries the
  same ?v=<sha256-8> into the manifest. Workbox now strips the v param on
  precache lookup (ignoreURLParametersMatching). Covers 4 of the 5 cache
  layers (HTTP, CDN, SW precache, Chrome WebAPK); OS icon cache is a
  user-side problem — surfaced in the install modal as a collapsible
  reinstall hint with iOS / Android / desktop branches.
- src/iconCacheBust.test.ts: 6-assertion tripwire (source-level wiring +
  dist-level verification) so a future removal of any piece fails CI
  instead of silently shipping stale icons.
- Record EVENT_BUS as Not Applicable: no cross-service pub/sub need
  surfaced. Vue reactivity + Dexie liveQuery + postMessage cover the
  current demand.
- Save-as-PDF button was already in place (WorkspaceDetailView.vue:152);
  no code change needed.

All 112 tests pass, vue-tsc clean, vite build emits versioned hrefs in
dist/index.html + dist/manifest.webmanifest and the /^v$/ ignore in
dist/sw.js.

Tags: pwa, docs, infra, cleanup, test
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-repo-cleanup
Semver: minor
